evidence.interpretation: Node23-vs-bxcpu coordinate variation is within same-host repeat variation; exact PDB hashes are not a valid determinism requirement for this refinement step.

production_decision.fallback: Use Node23 only if a bxcpu shard fails or capacity is lost; create a disjoint replacement shard and explicit merged manifest before release.
production_decision.reason: The active bxcpu campaign already has frozen 8-shard manifests and downstream archive/hash closure. Splitting it now would save only about one-node equivalent while adding cross-campaign aggregation risk.
